name: AA_NDR_ARTILAR
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[AA_NDR_ARTILAR] AS
-----kasa
SELECT '01 Kasa Bakiyeleri' as Açıklama, KASA.CODE AS Kodu ,KASA.NAME as Adı,
(CASE LINE.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END) AS Tutar,
(CASE LINE.TRCURR WHEN 1 THEN '2-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' ELSE '1-TL' END) AS DövizTürü


FROM LG_001_01_KSLINES AS LINE 

INNER JOIN LG_001_KSCARD AS KASA ON KASA.LOGICALREF=LINE.CARDREF UNION ALL

--------banka
SELECT '02 Banka Bakiyeleri' as Açıklama,BANKA.CODE AS Kodu,BANKA.DEFINITION_ AS Adı,
(SELECT     SUM(DEBIT - CREDIT) AS TOPLAM
FROM         dbo.LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL WHERE CARDREF =HESAP.LOGICALREF AND TOTTYP IN (1, 4)
GROUP BY CARDREF ) AS Tutar,
(CASE HESAP.CURRENCY WHEN 1 THEN '2-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' ELSE '1-TL' END) AS DövizTürü
FROM LG_001_BANKACC AS HESAP 
INNER JOIN LG_001_BNCARD AS BANKA ON BANKA.LOGICALREF=HESAP.BANKREF where HESAP.ACTIVE=0  AND (SELECT     SUM(DEBIT - CREDIT) AS TOPLAM
FROM         dbo.LG_001_01_BNTOTFIL WHERE CARDREF =HESAP.LOGICALREF AND TOTTYP IN (1, 4)
GROUP BY CARDREF )>0  UNION ALL
------portfoydekı ÇEKLER

SELECT '03 Portföydeki Çek ve Senetler' as Açıklama,PORTFOYNO AS Kodu,BANKNAME as Adı,AMOUNT as Tutar, '1-TL' AS DövizTürü
 
 FROM LG_001_01_CSCARD where CURRSTAT=1 UNION ALL
 
------ TAKAS TAHSILCEKLER
 SELECT '04 Takas ve Tahsildeki Çek Senetler' as Açıklama,PORTFOYNO AS Kodu,BANKNAME as Adı,AMOUNT as Tutar, '1-TL' AS DövizTürü
 
 FROM LG_001_01_CSCARD where CURRSTAT=4  UNION ALL
 ------120 HESAPLAR
 SELECT '05 Cari Hesap Bakiyeleri' as Açıklama, CLCARD.CODE AS Kodu ,CLCARD.DEFINITION_ as Adı,
(CASE LINE.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END) AS Tutar,
(CASE LINE.TRCURR WHEN 1 THEN '1-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' ELSE '1-TL' END) AS DövizTürü

FROM LG_001_01_CLFLINE AS LINE  
INNER JOIN LG_001_CLCARD AS CLCARD ON CLCARD.LOGICALREF=LINE.CLIENTREF 

WHERE 
LINE.CANCELLED=0

AND (select SUM(CASE WHEN SIGN=0 THEN AMOUNT ELSE AMOUNT*-1 END ) FROM LG_001_01_CLFLINE WHERE CLIENTREF=CLCARD.LOGICALREF AND CANCELLED=0)>0






UNION ALL
-----vergi alacagımız
SELECT '07 Vergi ve Kamu Alacakları' as Açıklama, LINE.ACCOUNTCODE AS Kodu ,
(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_001_EMUHACC WHERE CODE=LINE.ACCOUNTCODE) as Adı,
(CASE LINE.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END) AS Tutar,
(CASE LINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN '1-TL' WHEN 1 THEN '2-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' END) AS DövizTürü
FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE AS LINE WHERE LINE.KEBIRCODE IN (136,190) AND
((SELECT SUM((CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END))
FROM dbo.LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE IN (136,190)))>0 UNION ALL
-----ARAZİ BINALAR
SELECT '08 Arazi ve Binalar' as Açıklama, LINE.ACCOUNTCODE AS Kodu ,
(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_001_EMUHACC WHERE CODE=LINE.ACCOUNTCODE) as Adı,
(CASE LINE.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END) AS Tutar,
(CASE LINE.TRCURR WHEN 1 THEN '2-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' ELSE '1-TL' END) AS DövizTürü
FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE AS LINE WHERE LINE.KEBIRCODE='250' AND
((SELECT SUM((CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END))
FROM dbo.LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE='250'))>0 UNION ALL
-----şüpeli alacaklar

 SELECT '09 Şüpheli Alacaklar' as Açıklama, CLCARD.CODE AS Kodu ,CLCARD.DEFINITION_ as Adı,
(CASE LINE.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END) AS Tutar,
(CASE LINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN '1-TL' WHEN 1 THEN '2-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' END) AS DövizTürü

FROM LG_001_01_CLFLINE AS LINE  
INNER JOIN LG_001_CLCARD AS CLCARD ON CLCARD.LOGICALREF=LINE.CLIENTREF WHERE CLCARD.CODE LIKE'128%'
AND
((SELECT     SUM((CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END)) AS TOPLAM
FROM         dbo.LG_001_01_CLFLINE WHERE CLIENTREF =CLCARD.LOGICALREF GROUP BY CLIENTREF))>0 UNION ALL

-----personele borçlar
SELECT '10 Personele Boçlar' as Açıklama, LINE.ACCOUNTCODE AS Kodu ,
(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_001_EMUHACC WHERE CODE=LINE.ACCOUNTCODE) as Adı,
(CASE LINE.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END) AS Tutar,
(CASE LINE.TRCURR WHEN 1 THEN '2-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' ELSE '1-TL' END) AS DövizTürü
FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE AS LINE WHERE LINE.KEBIRCODE IN (335) AND
((SELECT SUM((CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END))
FROM dbo.LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE IN (335)))>0 
UNION ALL
-----elhova yatırım
SELECT '11 Yapılmakta Olan Yatırımlar' as Açıklama, LINE.ACCOUNTCODE AS Kodu ,
(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_001_EMUHACC WHERE CODE=LINE.ACCOUNTCODE) as Adı,
(CASE LINE.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END) AS Tutar,
(CASE LINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN '1-TL' WHEN 1 THEN '2-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' END) AS DövizTürü
FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE AS LINE WHERE LINE.KEBIRCODE='258' AND
((SELECT SUM((CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END))
FROM dbo.LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE='258'))>0  UNION ALL

-----TAHSIL EDILEMEYEN ALACAKLAR
SELECT '12 Tahsil Edilemeyen Alacaklar' as Açıklama, LINE.ACCOUNTCODE AS Kodu ,
(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_001_EMUHACC WHERE CODE=LINE.ACCOUNTCODE) as Adı,
(CASE LINE.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END) AS Tutar,
(CASE LINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN '1-TL' WHEN 1 THEN '2-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' END) AS DövizTürü
FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE AS LINE WHERE LINE.KEBIRCODE IN (129) AND
((SELECT SUM((CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END))
FROM dbo.LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE KEBIRCODE IN (129)))>0 UNION ALL

-----ınşaat hesabı
SELECT '13 İnşaat Hesabı' as Açıklama, LINE.ACCOUNTCODE AS Kodu ,
(SELECT DEFINITION_ FROM LG_001_EMUHACC WHERE CODE=LINE.ACCOUNTCODE) as Adı,
(CASE LINE.SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END) AS Tutar,
(CASE LINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN '1-TL' WHEN 1 THEN '2-USD' WHEN 20 THEN '3-EUR' END) AS DövizTürü
FROM LG_001_01_EMFLINE AS LINE WHERE LINE.ACCOUNTCODE='252.01.004' AND
((SELECT SUM((CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN TRNET WHEN 1 THEN TRNET*-1 END))
FROM dbo.LG_001_01_EMFLINE WHERE ACCOUNTCODE='252.01.004'))>0
